VALIDATION.PATTERN_UPPERCASE_ALPHANUMERIC: Must start with uppercase letter and contain only A-Z, 0-9, _
VALIDATION.PATTERN_ROUTE: Must start with / and contain only lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens

ERRORS.NETWORK_ERROR: Network connection error. Please check your internet connection.
ERRORS.TIMEOUT: Request timed out. Please try again.
ERRORS.CONNECTION_REFUSED: Unable to connect to the server. Please try again later.
ERRORS.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: An internal server error occurred. Please try again later.
ERRORS.BAD_REQUEST: Invalid request. Please check your input.
ERRORS.CONFLICT: A conflict occurred. The resource may have been modified.
ERRORS.BAD_GATEWAY: Server is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
ERRORS.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: Service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
ERRORS.GATEWAY_TIMEOUT: Server response timeout. Please try again.
ERRORS.VALIDATION_FAILED: Validation failed. Please check your input.
ERRORS.USERNAME_EXISTS: Username already exists. Please choose a different username.
ERRORS.TOKEN_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
ERRORS.INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS: You do not have permission to perform this action.
ERRORS.ENTITY_NOT_FOUND: The requested item was not found.
ERRORS.ENTITY_IN_USE: This item is currently in use and cannot be deleted.
ERRORS.OPERATION_FAILED: The operation failed. Please try again.
ERRORS.STATE_CONFLICT: The operation could not be completed due to a state conflict.
ERRORS.MASTER_LOOKUP_KEY_DUPLICATE: A master lookup with this key already exists.
ERRORS.MASTER_LOOKUP_ACTIVE_DETAILS_EXIST: Cannot deactivate master lookup. It has active details.
ERRORS.MASTER_LOOKUP_DETAILS_EXIST: Cannot delete master lookup. It still has details.
ERRORS.MASTER_LOOKUP_FK_VIOLATION: Cannot delete master lookup because it is in use.
ERRORS.LOOKUP_VALUE_INVALID: Lookup value is invalid or inactive.
ERRORS.LOOKUP_DETAIL_CODE_DUPLICATE: A detail with this code already exists in the lookup.
ERRORS.LOOKUP_DETAIL_FK_VIOLATION: Cannot delete lookup detail because it is referenced by other records.
ERRORS.FILE_SIZE_EXCEEDED: File size exceeds the allowed limit.
ERRORS.FILE_UPLOAD_READ_FAILED: Unable to read the uploaded file.
ERRORS.FILE_TOKEN_ISSUE_FAILED: Unable to issue the access token.
ERRORS.FILE_TOKEN_EXPIRED: This link has expired — please request a new one.
ERRORS.FILE_TOKEN_ALREADY_USED: This link has already been used.
ERRORS.FILE_DELETE_NOT_AUTHORIZED: You are not authorized to delete this file.
ERRORS.FILE_NO_LONGER_AVAILABLE: This file is no longer available.
ERRORS.USER_HAS_ACTIVE_REFRESH_TOKENS: Cannot delete user. User has active sessions.
ERRORS.USER_HAS_DEPENDENCIES: Cannot delete user. User has associated data.
ERRORS.ROLE_ALREADY_EXISTS: A role with this name already exists.
ERRORS.PERMISSION_NOT_ASSIGNED: Permission is not assigned to this role.
ERRORS.PERMISSIONS_NOT_FOUND: One or more permissions were not found.
ERRORS.CANNOT_REMOVE_VIEW_PERMISSION: Cannot remove view permission while other permissions exist.
ERRORS.PAGE_ALREADY_ASSIGNED: This page is already assigned to the role.
ERRORS.PAGE_NOT_ASSIGNED: This page is not assigned to the role.
ERRORS.NO_PERMISSIONS_TO_COPY: The source role has no permissions to copy.
ERRORS.DB_CONSTRAINT_VIOLATION: Cannot complete operation due to data constraints.
